action.reasoning: Observation: baseline frozen ESM2-150M mean-pooled + MLP head gave spearman_rho=-0.0178 (near random). Training loss decreased from 9.3 to 7.4 in 2 epochs, but performance extremely poor. Analysis: frozen mean pooling over full 735-AA sequence dilutes mutation signals concentrated in positions 561-588. The model cannot capture fitness-relevant mutations. Decision: implement LoRA fine-tuning of ESM2-150M with CLS token representation, train 5 epochs with mixed precision, submit eval to measure improvement and iteration time.
